info.title: LifeSync API
info.description: Personal development and productivity management API with tasks, goals, habits, mood tracking, journaling, and pomodoro timer features.

tags.name: Goals
tags.description: Goal tracking with milestones and progress prediction

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging and Telegram notifications

get.description: Check API, database, and Redis connectivity status

post.description: Create a new user account with email and password
Authenticate user with email and password
Send password reset token via notification

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive dashboard with tasks, goals, habits, and recent activities
Get all task categories for the authenticated user
Get filtered list of tasks with pagination

post.description: Create a new task with optional subtasks
Mark task as completed and update progress
Add a subtask to an existing task

get.description: Get all goals with optional filters

post.description: Create a new goal with tracking metrics

patch.description: Update current value and recalculate progress

get.description: Predict when goal will be completed based on current progress rate

post.description: Mark habit as completed for today

delete.description: Remove completion for a specific date

post.description: Track mood with up to 10 emotions from 48-emotion system

get.description: Analyze mood patterns over time with energy and valence dimensions
Get data formatted for 4D mood visualization (Energy × Valence)

post.description: Register Firebase Cloud Messaging device token

bearerAuth.description: Enter JWT token obtained from login/register

expectedProgress.description: Expected progress based on time elapsed

isOnTrack.description: Whether goal is on track to meet deadline

recommendedDailyProgress.description: Recommended progress per day to meet deadline
